exhaustOptions.description: The ultimate BMW exhaust upgrade. Used on M cars worldwide.
Variable volume valve control. Quiet mode to full roar.
German engineered. Perfect tone for the M6 V10 engine.
The most popular M4 exhaust upgrade. Aggressive crackle on deceleration.
Austrian made. Deep aggressive tone with sport valves.
Raspy aggressive tone. Very popular on F82 M4 builds.
Remote controlled valve exhaust. Whisper quiet to full race mode.
Full titanium race system. Aggressive crackle and pops on overrun.
Austrian precision. Deep growl with sport valve control.
Raw and aggressive tone. No resonator for maximum volume.
App-controlled valve system. Silent cruise to full race mode.

shops.name: West Coast Customs
shops.bio: West Coast Customs is the premier automotive restyling center in Southern California, known worldwide for transforming ordinary vehicles into extraordinary works of art. With over two decades of experience, our master technicians specialize in full vehicle wraps, custom wheel packages, and precision body kits. From celebrity builds to everyday drivers, we deliver showroom-quality results on every project. Our 20,000 sq ft facility features a climate-controlled paint and wrap bay, a dedicated wheel and tire center, and a full fabrication shop.

customerReviews.name: Marcus Chen
customerReviews.comment: Absolutely blown away by the matte black wrap on my M4. Flawless installation, zero bubbles, and the edges are tucked perfectly. These guys are true artists.

customerReviews.name: Sarah Mitchell
customerReviews.comment: Got a full body kit and wheel package installed. The attention to detail is incredible. They even color-matched the calipers to my wrap. Highly recommend.

customerReviews.name: David Park
customerReviews.comment: Third time bringing my cars here. Consistent quality every single time. The chrome delete on my M6 looks factory. Worth every penny.

customerReviews.name: Jessica Ramirez
customerReviews.comment: Great work on my tint job. Only reason for 4 stars is the wait time was a bit longer than quoted, but the quality made up for it.

customerReviews.name: Ryan O'Connor
customerReviews.comment: Had the full Akrapovic exhaust system installed here. Sound is absolutely incredible and the fitment is perfect. No rattles, no leaks. Professional work from start to finish.

customerReviews.name: Nina Patel
customerReviews.comment: The ceramic tint they installed on my 3 Series looks fantastic and the heat rejection is noticeable. Shop was busy so it took an extra day but they kept me informed throughout.

customerReviews.name: Carlos Mendez
customerReviews.comment: The wheel installation looks great and they balanced everything perfectly. However I had to bring it back for a minor alignment issue. They fixed it promptly without charge which I appreciated.

customerReviews.name: Alex Kim
customerReviews.comment: Full satin grey wrap with carbon fiber accents on the hood and trunk. Absolutely stunning result. The transitions between materials are seamless. You can tell these guys take pride in their work.

shops.name: Platinum Motorsport
shops.bio: Platinum Motorsport is LA's most exclusive high-end automotive customization facility. We specialize in exotic car modifications, performance tuning, and luxury vehicle transformations. Our team has built some of the most iconic cars seen on social media and at major car shows worldwide. We work with brands like Ferrari, Lamborghini, McLaren, and BMW M to deliver builds that push boundaries. Our 15,000 sq ft showroom and service center is equipped with state-of-the-art dyno testing, alignment racks, and a dedicated detailing bay.

customerReviews.name: Anthony Brooks
customerReviews.comment: Had my M4 lowered on KW V3 coilovers with a full alignment. The ride quality is perfect and the stance is aggressive without being impractical. These guys know BMWs.

customerReviews.name: Olivia Santos
customerReviews.comment: Platinum did an amazing job on my Urus. Full satin wrap, lowered suspension, and custom forged wheels. The build went viral on Instagram. 10/10.

customerReviews.name: Tyler Washington
customerReviews.comment: Really solid performance work. ECU tune made a noticeable difference. Shop is clean and professional. A bit pricey but you get what you pay for.

customerReviews.name: Mia Chang
customerReviews.comment: Best exhaust install I have ever had. No rattles, perfect fitment, and the sound is absolutely insane. Will be back for coilovers next month.

customerReviews.name: Brandon Lee
customerReviews.comment: Good work overall but the communication could be better. Took longer than expected and I had to call for updates. The end result on my suspension setup is solid though.

customerReviews.name: Sophie Nguyen
customerReviews.comment: Full performance package on my M3 Competition. Downpipes, tune, intake, and intercooler. Gained significant power and the car pulls like crazy now. Dyno sheets don't lie.

customerReviews.name: Daniel Garcia
customerReviews.comment: Had Vossen wheels installed with spacers. The fitment is dialed in perfectly. Small ding on one cap during install but they replaced it immediately. Stand-up shop.

shops.name: RDB LA
shops.bio: RDB LA is the celebrity-favorite automotive customization studio in Los Angeles. Known for creating some of the most jaw-dropping builds in the industry, our team of expert fabricators, painters, and installers transform vehicles into one-of-a-kind masterpieces. We specialize in full custom builds that include interior reupholstery, complete color changes, custom audio systems, and performance modifications. Our client list reads like a who's who of entertainment and sports. Every build that leaves our facility is a rolling work of art.

customerReviews.name: James Rodriguez
customerReviews.comment: RDB did a complete transformation on my G82 M4. Satin grey wrap, black chrome delete, custom interior, and an Akrapovic exhaust. The build is beyond anything I imagined.

customerReviews.name: Brianna Foster
customerReviews.comment: Got ceramic tint on all windows and the quality is flawless. No bubbles, perfectly even shade. They also detailed the interior while they worked. Above and beyond.

customerReviews.name: Kevin Nguyen
customerReviews.comment: The interior work RDB does is next level. Full Alcantara headliner, custom steering wheel, and sport seats reupholstered in Italian leather. My car feels brand new.

customerReviews.name: Aaliyah Thompson
customerReviews.comment: I have been to many shops in LA but RDB is on another level. The craftsmanship, communication, and final result were all perfect. Already planning my next build with them.

customerReviews.name: Derek Patel
customerReviews.comment: Full build including lowered suspension, forged wheels, wrap, tint, and exhaust. Everything was done in two weeks as promised. The car is absolutely stunning.

customerReviews.name: Michelle Park
customerReviews.comment: Beautiful work on the wrap. Took slightly longer than estimated but they kept me updated. The final result is perfect and I get compliments everywhere I go.

customerReviews.name: Travis Scott
customerReviews.comment: Had my exhaust and suspension done here. The combination of the Akrapovic system with KW coilovers completely transformed the driving experience. Worth every dollar.

customerReviews.name: Rachel Adams
customerReviews.comment: Excellent tint job and window treatment. Shop is super clean and organized. Pricing is premium but the quality matches. Would come back for my next vehicle.

customerReviews.name: Omar Hassan
customerReviews.comment: Complete color change wrap on my M6. They matched the door jambs and every panel gap is invisible. This is hands down the best wrap shop in Southern California.
